title: Toolchain Selection, Compatibility, and Reproducible Setup · Failure Case: Dependency Lock
summary: Select a minimal compatible toolchain and prove clean-machine setup. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates dependency lock increment in a pinned bootstrap and compatibility matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Commit appropriate lockfiles and verify deterministic clean installs.
Pin supported runtime and package-manager versions with one authoritative source.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
